title: woof reviewer disposition front-matter
description: YAML front-matter of the disposition at epics/E<N>/dispositions/work-unit-<id>.md within the project state root in the operator home, ~/.woof/state/projects/<project-key>/ (ADR-017). Written by graph-owned review_disposition after a non-blocking reviewer critique. Blocker critiques open a human gate instead of producing a disposition.

target.description: Disposition target for a work-unit critique.

critique_path.description: Path of the reviewer critique this disposition answers, relative to the epic directory that holds both files.

severity.description: Roll-up reviewer severity being answered. Blocker is intentionally excluded.

harness.description: Legacy route identifier retained for old model-authored dispositions.

session_ref.description: Optional legacy dispatch audit pointer for model-authored dispositions.

updated_paths.description: Repo-relative paths updated while accepting reviewer feedback.

dispositions.description: One entry for each reviewer finding. Empty only when the critique has no findings.

decision.description: accepted = artefacts were updated or no code change was needed; rejected = primary disagrees and records why; deferred = follow-up work is needed outside this work unit.
